summary: Scripts show solid PowerShell practices (error handling, param validation, literal paths) and reasonable YAML setup. Critical gaps: no Pester test file (workflow references PRLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1 but missing), no fixture files (hardcoded paths don't exist), no test harness or act-result.txt artifact. workflow_dispatch input unused. Task requires TDD through act pipeline; deliverable incomplete. Workflow fails immediately at missing fixtures/changed-files.txt.
